bodies.name: ISTA
bodies.description: International Safe Transit Association procedures for package performance testing.

bodies.name: TAPPI
bodies.description: Technical Association of the Pulp and Paper Industry.

bodies.name: FEFCO
bodies.description: European Federation of Corrugated Board Manufacturers - box style codes.

bodies.name: USP
bodies.description: United States Pharmacopeia - packaging and container standards.

standards.title: Compressive Resistance of Shipping Containers
standards.scope: Box compression test (BCT) - static top-load resistance of shipping containers, components, and unit loads.

standards.title: Performance Testing of Shipping Containers and Systems
standards.scope: Defines Distribution Cycles (DC) 1-18 with Assurance Levels I/II/III to simulate handling, stacking, vibration, drop, and environmental.
standards.key_apparatus: Drop tester, vibration table, compression machine
standards.key_params: DC-13 small parcel; DC-12 single package common

standards.title: Free-Fall Drop Test of Loaded Containers
standards.scope: Drop test procedure at specified height onto concrete; 10-drop sequence for faces, edges, corners.
standards.key_params: Drop height by product weight and shipping class

standards.title: Vibration Testing of Shipping Containers
standards.scope: Rotary, vertical linear, and random vibration methods for palletized and single-package testing.

standards.title: Standard Atmospheres for Conditioning
standards.scope: Conditioning paperboard and packages for testing (23°C / 50% RH standard).

standards.title: Thermal Insulation Performance
standards.scope: Performance of insulated shipping containers (cold chain qualification).

standards.title: Peel Adhesion of PSA Tape
standards.scope: 180° peel adhesion on stainless steel.

standards.title: Seal Strength of Flexible Barrier Materials
standards.scope: Tensile seal strength of pouch seals.

standards.title: Seal Integrity - Dye Penetration
standards.scope: Porous-to-nonporous seals in medical packaging.

standards.title: Non-Simulation Integrity for Packaged Products ≤68 kg
standards.scope: Shock and vibration with fixed parameters to challenge package/product integrity.

standards.title: Partial Simulation ≤68 kg
standards.scope: Combined simulation and non-simulation; atmospheric conditioning, compression, vibration, drop.
standards.key_params: Conditioning, 1.35 kPa compression, random vib, drops

standards.title: Packaged Products for Parcel Delivery System Shipment ≤70 kg
standards.scope: General simulation for single parcels shipped through small-package carriers (e.g., UPS, FedEx).
standards.key_params: Random vibration profile with top load, drop sequence

standards.title: Packaged Products for LTL Shipment
standards.scope: Simulates LTL freight environments for palletized and unitized loads.

standards.title: Similar Unitized Loads in Truckload
standards.scope: Full truckload distribution testing for unitized products.

standards.title: Ships In Own Container - Amazon
standards.scope: Amazon SIOC / Over-boxing / Prep-Free qualification.
standards.key_params: Type A/B/C/D based on product & ship mode

standards.title: FedEx Parcel Test (≤70 lb)
standards.scope: FedEx-specified procedure for packaging shipped via small parcel.

standards.title: Temperature Test for Transport Packaging
standards.scope: Thermal qualification of insulated shippers.

standards.title: Complete, Filled Transport Packages
standards.scope: General rules for compiling performance test schedules.

standards.title: Packaging for Terminally Sterilized Medical Devices
standards.scope: Part 1: materials; Part 2: validation of forming/sealing/assembly.

standards.title: Dimensions of Rigid Rectangular Packages
standards.scope: Modular 600x400 mm dimensions for harmonization with pallets.

standards.title: Environmental Management Systems
standards.scope: EMS framework applicable to packaging operations.

standards.title: Edgewise Compressive Strength of Corrugated Fiberboard (ECT)
standards.scope: Short column edgewise compression of combined corrugated board.

standards.title: Compression Test of Fiberboard Shipping Containers
standards.scope: Fixed-platen or floating-platen BCT method.

standards.title: Bursting Strength of Linerboard (Mullen)
standards.scope: Hydraulic burst strength of paperboard.

standards.title: Water Absorptiveness (Cobb Test)
standards.scope: Water absorption of paper and board.

standards.title: Standard Atmospheric Conditions - Paper
standards.scope: Conditioning of paper for testing.

standards.title: Plastic Packaging Systems for Pharmaceutical Use
standards.scope: <661.1> Materials of Construction; <661.2> Packaging Systems.

standards.title: Containers - Performance Testing
standards.scope: Moisture vapor transmission and light transmission of containers.

standards.title: Secondary Cells and Batteries - Safety
standards.scope: Influences lithium battery packaging requirements.

standards.title: Lithium Battery Shipping
standards.scope: Packaging Instructions 965-970 per IATA DGR & 49 CFR.
standards.key_params: State of charge limits, UN-rated boxes
